title: pouteria keyensis
intro: Pouteria keyensis, also known as Key Island Chestnut or Key Island Kamani, is a tropical plant species native to the islands of the Pacific Ocean, specifically the Keys. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pouteria keyensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Pouteria keyensis is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and it can also be used in topical applications, such as creams and salves, due to its anti-inflammatory properties.
